1	package cmd
2	
3	import (
4		"encoding/json"
5		"fmt"
6		"os"
7		"path/filepath"
8		"regexp"
9	
10		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/agent"
11		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/bead"
12		"github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/config"
13		"github.com/spf13/cobra"
14	)
15	
16	var validBeadID = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$`)
17	
18	// loadExecutionsMirrorConfig reads .ddx/config.yaml at projectRoot and returns
19	// the executions.mirror block when configured. Errors return nil silently —
20	// missing or invalid mirror config simply disables mirroring; it never blocks
21	// execute-bead.
22	func loadExecutionsMirrorConfig(projectRoot string) *config.ExecutionsMirrorConfig {
23		cfg, err := config.LoadWithWorkingDir(projectRoot)
24		if err != nil || cfg == nil || cfg.Executions == nil || cfg.Executions.Mirror == nil {
25			return nil
26		}
27		return cfg.Executions.Mirror
28	}
29	
30	// landingGitOpsFromFactory returns the agent.LandingGitOps the CommandFactory
31	// should use — either the test override or the default RealLandingGitOps.
32	func landingGitOpsFromFactory(f *CommandFactory) agent.LandingGitOps {
33		if f.executeBeadLandingGitOverride != nil {
34			return f.executeBeadLandingGitOverride
35		}
36		return agent.RealLandingGitOps{}
37	}
38	
39	func (f *CommandFactory) newAgentExecuteBeadCommand() *cobra.Command {
40		cmd := &cobra.Command{
41			Use:   "execute-bead <bead-id>",
42			Short: "Run an agent on one bead in an isolated worktree, then land the result",
43			Long: `execute-bead is the primitive: it runs a single agent on a single bead in
44	an isolated git worktree (the worker step), then hands the result to the
45	parent-side orchestrator which merges or preserves the commits.
46	
47	The worker classifies its outcome as one of:
48	  task_succeeded  — agent exited 0 and produced commits
49	  task_no_changes — agent exited 0 but made no commits
50	  task_failed     — agent exited non-zero
51	
52	The orchestrator then applies landing logic (merge, gate evaluation, preserve)
53	and the final result reflects both the worker and landing decisions.
54	
55	For normal queue-driven work use "ddx agent execute-loop", which claims
56	ready beads, calls this command, and closes or unclaims each bead based on
57	the result. Reach for execute-bead directly only to debug or re-run a
58	specific bead.
59	
60	Result status is reported on the "status:" line and is one of:
61	  success                          — merged (or preserved with --no-merge)
62	  no_changes                       — agent ran but produced no diff
63	  already_satisfied                — closed by the loop after repeated no_changes
64	  land_conflict                    — merge failed; result preserved
65	  post_run_check_failed            — checks failed; result preserved
66	  execution_failed                 — agent or harness error
67	  structural_validation_failed     — bead or prompt inputs invalid
68	
69	execute-loop closes the bead with session/commit evidence only on success
70	(and already_satisfied); every other status leaves the bead open and
71	unclaimed for a later attempt.`,
72			Example: `  # Debug one specific bead (prefer "execute-loop" for normal queue work)
73	  ddx agent execute-bead ddx-7a01ba6c
74	
75	  # Run against a non-HEAD base revision
76	  ddx agent execute-bead ddx-7a01ba6c --from main
77	
78	  # Preserve the result under refs/ddx/iterations/... instead of merging
79	  ddx agent execute-bead ddx-7a01ba6c --no-merge
80	
81	  # Pin harness/model for a debugging pass
82	  ddx agent execute-bead ddx-7a01ba6c --harness codex`,
83			Args: cobra.ExactArgs(1),
84			RunE: f.runAgentExecuteBead,
85		}
86		cmd.Flags().String("project", "", "Project root path (default: CWD git root). Env: DDX_PROJECT_ROOT")
87		cmd.Flags().String("from", "", "Base git revision to start from (default: HEAD)")
88		cmd.Flags().Bool("no-merge", false, "Skip merge; preserve result under refs/ddx/iterations/<bead-id>/<timestamp>-<base-shortsha> instead")
89		cmd.Flags().String("harness", "", "Agent harness to use")
90		cmd.Flags().String("model", "", "Model override")
91		cmd.Flags().String("provider", "", "Provider name (e.g. vidar, openrouter); selects a named provider from config")
92		cmd.Flags().String("model-ref", "", "Model catalog reference (e.g. code-medium); resolved via the model catalog")
93		cmd.Flags().String("effort", "", "Effort level")
94		cmd.Flags().String("context-budget", "", "Context budget for prompt: empty (full), minimal (omit large governing docs for cheap-tier)")
95		cmd.Flags().String("prompt", "", "Prompt file path (auto-generated from bead if omitted)")
96		cmd.Flags().Bool("json", false, "Output result as JSON")
97		return cmd
98	}
99	
100	func (f *CommandFactory) runAgentExecuteBead(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
101		beadID := args[0]
102		if !validBeadID.MatchString(beadID) {
103			return fmt.Errorf("invalid bead ID %q: must contain only letters, digits, dots, underscores, and hyphens", beadID)
104		}
105		projectFlag, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("project")
106		fromRev, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("from")
107		noMerge, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("no-merge")
108		harness, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("harness")
109		model, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("model")
110		provider, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("provider")
111		modelRef, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("model-ref")
112		effort, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("effort")
113		contextBudget, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("context-budget")
114		promptFile, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("prompt")
115		asJSON, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("json")
116	
117		projectRoot := resolveProjectRoot(projectFlag, f.WorkingDir)
118	
119		workerOpts := agent.ExecuteBeadOptions{
120			FromRev:       fromRev,
121			Harness:       harness,
122			Model:         model,
123			Provider:      provider,
124			ModelRef:      modelRef,
125			Effort:        effort,
126			ContextBudget: contextBudget,
127			PromptFile:    promptFile,
128			WorkerID:      os.Getenv("DDX_WORKER_ID"),
129			BeadEvents:    bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
130			MirrorCfg:     loadExecutionsMirrorConfig(projectRoot),
131		}
132	
133		var gitOps agent.GitOps = &agent.RealGitOps{}
134		if f.executeBeadGitOverride != nil {
135			gitOps = f.executeBeadGitOverride
136		}
137	
138		var orchestratorGitOps agent.OrchestratorGitOps = &agent.RealOrchestratorGitOps{}
139		if f.executeBeadOrchestratorGitOverride != nil {
140			orchestratorGitOps = f.executeBeadOrchestratorGitOverride
141		}
142	
143		// Test injection seam: AgentRunnerOverride feeds canned *Result values
144		// from fakes without spinning up a real provider. Production callers
145		// leave this nil so ExecuteBead constructs an agent service from
146		// projectRoot internally.
147		if f.AgentRunnerOverride != nil {
148			workerOpts.AgentRunner = f.AgentRunnerOverride
149		}
150	
151		// Preflight the orphan-model check before creating a worktree. Mirrors
152		// the execute-loop preflight so `ddx agent execute-bead --model <unroutable>`
153		// errors before any git work happens rather than mid-execution. Skip the
154		// preflight when a test runner override is in use — overrides may be
155		// fakes that bypass routing entirely.
156		if f.AgentRunnerOverride == nil {
157			if err := agent.ValidateForExecuteLoopViaService(cmd.Context(), f.WorkingDir, harness, model, provider, modelRef); err != nil {
158				return err
159			}
160		}
161	
162		// Recover any orphaned worktrees from previous crashed runs before
163		// spawning a new worker. This is the parent's responsibility.
164		agent.RecoverOrphans(gitOps, projectRoot, beadID)
165	
166		// Worker step: run the agent in an isolated worktree.
167		res, err := agent.ExecuteBead(cmd.Context(), projectRoot, beadID, workerOpts, gitOps)
168		if err != nil && res == nil {
169			return err
170		}
171	
172		// Orchestrator step: land the result (ff or merge → push, gate eval,
173		// preserve). Always run when we have a result — the orchestrator handles
174		// all cases including no-changes and error (agent failed with no commits).
175		//
176		// Single-bead CLI is strictly serial (no sibling workers in this
177		// process), so we can wire the LandingAdvancer to call Land() directly
178		// without going through a per-project coordinator goroutine. Tests may
179		// inject a custom advancer via f.executeBeadLandingAdvancerOverride.
180		if res != nil {
181			var advancer func(r *agent.ExecuteBeadResult) (*agent.LandResult, error)
182			if f.executeBeadLandingAdvancerOverride != nil {
183				advancer = f.executeBeadLandingAdvancerOverride
184			} else {
185				landingGitOps := landingGitOpsFromFactory(f)
186				advancer = func(r *agent.ExecuteBeadResult) (*agent.LandResult, error) {
187					return agent.Land(projectRoot, agent.BuildLandRequestFromResult(projectRoot, r), landingGitOps)
188				}
189			}
190			landingOpts := agent.BeadLandingOptions{
191				NoMerge:         noMerge,
192				LandingAdvancer: advancer,
193			}
194	
195			// Wire required execution gates: when the worker manifest declares
196			// governing IDs, gate-eval them in an ephemeral worktree at ResultRev
197			// before LandBeadResult decides merge vs preserve. The original
198			// worker worktree was cleaned up by ExecuteBead, so we pin ResultRev
199			// to a transient ref and check it out into a temp worktree for the
200			// duration of gate evaluation.
201			if res != nil && res.ResultRev != "" && res.ResultRev != res.BaseRev && res.ExitCode == 0 {
202				wt, ids, cleanup, ctxErr := agent.BuildLandingGateContext(projectRoot, res, gitOps)
203				if ctxErr != nil {
204					// Soft-fail: log and skip gate eval rather than abort the land.
205					fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "ddx: warning: gate-context setup failed: %v (skipping required-gate eval)\n", ctxErr)
206				} else if wt != "" {
207					defer cleanup()
208					landingOpts.WtPath = wt
209					landingOpts.GovernIDs = ids
210					landingOpts.ChecksArtifactPath = filepath.Join(projectRoot, res.ExecutionDir, "checks.json")
211					landingOpts.ChecksArtifactRel = filepath.Join(res.ExecutionDir, "checks.json")
212				}
213			}
214	
215			if landing, landErr := agent.LandBeadResult(projectRoot, res, orchestratorGitOps, landingOpts); landErr == nil {
216				agent.ApplyLandingToResult(res, landing)
217			} else if err == nil {
218				err = landErr
219			}
220		}
221	
222		if err != nil {
223			_ = writeExecuteBeadResult(cmd, res, asJSON)
224			return err
225		}
226	
227		return writeExecuteBeadResult(cmd, res, asJSON)
228	}
229	
230	func writeExecuteBeadResult(cmd *cobra.Command, res *agent.ExecuteBeadResult, asJSON bool) error {
231		if res == nil {
232			return nil
233		}
234		if asJSON {
235			enc := json.NewEncoder(cmd.OutOrStdout())
236			enc.SetIndent("", "  ")
237			return enc.Encode(res)
238		}
239	
240		fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "bead:    %s\n", res.BeadID)
241		fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "base:    %s\n", res.BaseRev)
242		if res.ResultRev != "" && res.ResultRev != res.BaseRev {
243			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "result:  %s\n", res.ResultRev)
244		}
245		fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "outcome: %s\n", res.Outcome)
246		fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "status:  %s\n", res.Status)
247		if res.Detail != "" {
248			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "detail:  %s\n", res.Detail)
249		}
250		if res.NoChangesRationale != "" {
251			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "rationale: %s\n", res.NoChangesRationale)
252		}
253		if res.PreserveRef != "" {
254			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "ref:     %s\n", res.PreserveRef)
255		}
256		return nil
257	}

561	func ExecuteBead(ctx context.Context, projectRoot string, beadID string, opts ExecuteBeadOptions, gitOps GitOps) (*ExecuteBeadResult, error) {
562		if ctx == nil {
563			ctx = context.Background()
564		}
565		attemptID := GenerateAttemptID()
566		if opts.WorkerID == "" {
567			opts.WorkerID = os.Getenv("DDX_WORKER_ID")
568		}
569	
570		wtPath := executeBeadWorktreePath(beadID, attemptID)
571		if mkErr := os.MkdirAll(filepath.Dir(wtPath), 0o755); mkErr != nil {
572			return nil, fmt.Errorf("creating execute-bead worktree parent dir: %w", mkErr)
573		}
574	
575		// Commit beads.jsonl before spawning worktree so the worktree snapshot
576		// includes any bead metadata updates (e.g. spec-id).
577		if err := CommitTracker(projectRoot); err != nil {
578			return nil, err
579		}
580	
581		// Checkpoint any remaining caller dirt as a real commit on the current
582		// branch (FEAT-012 §22, US-126 AC#1). The new HEAD becomes the effective
583		// base for the worker worktree; caller's edits are preserved as a normal
584		// commit they can `git reset HEAD~` if they want them back uncommitted.
585		if _, err := gitOps.SynthesizeCommit(projectRoot, "chore: checkpoint pre-execute-bead "+attemptID); err != nil {
586			return nil, fmt.Errorf("pre-execute-bead checkpoint: %w", err)
587		}
588	
589		// Resolve base revision after the tracker + checkpoint commits.
590		baseRev, err := resolveBase(gitOps, projectRoot, opts.FromRev)
591		if err != nil {
592			return nil, err
593		}
594	
595		// Create the isolated worktree. Orphan recovery is the parent's responsibility
596		// (call RecoverOrphans before invoking workers).
597		if err := gitOps.WorktreeAdd(projectRoot, wtPath, baseRev); err != nil {
598			return nil, fmt.Errorf("creating isolated worktree: %w", err)
599		}
600		defer func() {
601			_ = gitOps.WorktreeRemove(projectRoot, wtPath)
602		}()
603	
604		// Repair project-local skill symlinks whose targets do not resolve inside
605		// the freshly created worktree.
606		_ = materializeWorktreeSkills(wtPath)
607	
608		// Prepare artifacts (context load, prompt generation).
609		artifacts, err := prepareArtifacts(projectRoot, wtPath, beadID, attemptID, baseRev, opts)
610		if err != nil {
611			res := &ExecuteBeadResult{
612				BeadID:    beadID,
613				AttemptID: attemptID,
614				WorkerID:  opts.WorkerID,
615				BaseRev:   baseRev,
616				ResultRev: baseRev, // no commits; ResultRev == BaseRev signals no output
617				ExitCode:  1,
618				Error:     err.Error(),
619				Outcome:   ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskFailed,
620			}
621			if abInfo, _ := os.Stat(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ExecuteBeadArtifactDir, attemptID)); abInfo != nil && abInfo.IsDir() {
622				res.ExecutionDir = filepath.Join(ExecuteBeadArtifactDir, attemptID)
623			}
624			res.FailureMode = ClassifyFailureMode(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Error)
625			populateWorkerStatus(res)
626			_ = writeArtifactJSON(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ExecuteBeadArtifactDir, attemptID, "result.json"), res)
627			return res, fmt.Errorf("execute-bead context load: %w", err)
628		}
629	
630		// Pre-create the execution bundle dir in the worktree so the agent can write
631		// artifacts (e.g. no_changes_rationale.txt) without needing to create the
632		// directory itself. Failures are non-fatal: the agent can create it on demand.
633		_ = os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(wtPath, artifacts.DirRel), 0o755)
634	
635		// Redirect per-run session/telemetry output into the DDx-owned execution
636		// bundle so the embedded harness does not accumulate state at the worktree root.
637		embeddedStateDir := filepath.Join(artifacts.DirAbs, "embedded")
638		if err := os.MkdirAll(embeddedStateDir, 0o755); err != nil {
639			return nil, fmt.Errorf("creating embedded state dir: %w", err)
640		}
641	
642		sessionID := GenerateSessionID()
643		startedAt := time.Now().UTC()
644	
645		runOpts := RunOptions{
646			Context:       ctx,
647			Harness:       opts.Harness,
648			Prompt:        "",
649			PromptFile:    artifacts.PromptAbs,
650			Model:         opts.Model,
651			Provider:      opts.Provider,
652			ModelRef:      opts.ModelRef,
653			Effort:        opts.Effort,
654			WorkDir:       wtPath,
655			Permissions:   "unrestricted", // isolated worktree; writes must not require approval
656			SessionLogDir: embeddedStateDir,
657			Correlation: map[string]string{
658				"bead_id":     beadID,
659				"base_rev":    baseRev,
660				"attempt_id":  attemptID,
661				"session_id":  sessionID,
662				"worker_id":   opts.WorkerID,
663				"bundle_path": artifacts.DirRel,
664				"prompt_file": artifacts.PromptRel,
665			},
666		}
667	
668		agentResult, agentErr := dispatchAgentRun(ctx, projectRoot, opts, runOpts)
669		finishedAt := time.Now().UTC()
670	
671		exitCode := 0
672		tokens := 0
673		inputTokens := 0
674		outputTokens := 0
675		costUSD := 0.0
676		resultModel := opts.Model
677		resultHarness := opts.Harness
678		resultProvider := ""
679		agentErrMsg := ""
680		if agentResult != nil {
681			exitCode = agentResult.ExitCode
682			tokens = agentResult.Tokens
683			inputTokens = agentResult.InputTokens
684			outputTokens = agentResult.OutputTokens
685			costUSD = agentResult.CostUSD
686			if agentResult.Error != "" {
687				agentErrMsg = agentResult.Error
688			}
689			if agentResult.Model != "" {
690				resultModel = agentResult.Model
691			}
692			if agentResult.Provider != "" {
693				resultProvider = agentResult.Provider
694			}
695			if agentResult.Harness != "" {
696				resultHarness = agentResult.Harness
697			}
698		}
699		if agentErr != nil {
700			if exitCode == 0 {
701				exitCode = 1
702			}
703			agentErrMsg = agentErr.Error()
704		}
705	
706		// Capture routing evidence from the agent result. These fields are
707		// populated by RunAgent (embedded harness) and RunScript (script harness).
708		routeReason := ""
709		routeBaseURL := ""
710		if agentResult != nil {
711			routeReason = agentResult.RouteReason
712			routeBaseURL = agentResult.ResolvedBaseURL
713		}
714	
715		// Get the HEAD of the worktree after the agent ran.
716		resultRev, revErr := gitOps.HeadRev(wtPath)
717		if revErr != nil {
718			res := &ExecuteBeadResult{
719				BeadID:       beadID,
720				AttemptID:    attemptID,
721				WorkerID:     opts.WorkerID,
722				BaseRev:      baseRev,
723				ResultRev:    baseRev, // no commits readable; treat as no output
724				Harness:      resultHarness,
725				Provider:     resultProvider,
726				Model:        resultModel,
727				SessionID:    sessionID,
728				DurationMS:   int(finishedAt.Sub(startedAt).Milliseconds()),
729				Tokens:       tokens,
730				CostUSD:      costUSD,
731				ExitCode:     1,
732				Error:        agentErrMsg,
733				Reason:       revErr.Error(), // HeadRev failure; orchestrator prefers this over Error for Reason
734				ExecutionDir: artifacts.DirRel,
735				PromptFile:   artifacts.PromptRel,
736				ManifestFile: artifacts.ManifestRel,
737				ResultFile:   artifacts.ResultRel,
738				StartedAt:    startedAt,
739				FinishedAt:   finishedAt,
740				Outcome:      ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskFailed,
741			}
742			res.FailureMode = ClassifyFailureMode(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Error)
743			populateWorkerStatus(res)
744			_ = writeArtifactJSON(artifacts.ResultAbs, res)
745			return res, fmt.Errorf("failed to read worktree HEAD: %w", revErr)
746		}
747	
748		// Write usage.json when the harness reports token usage or cost.
749		// Done before SynthesizeCommit so usage data is available in the
750		// preliminary result written for commit-message sourcing.
751		var usageFileRel string
752		if tokens > 0 || costUSD > 0 {
753			usage := executeBeadUsage{
754				AttemptID:    attemptID,
755				Harness:      resultHarness,
756				Provider:     resultProvider,
757				Model:        resultModel,
758				Tokens:       tokens,
759				InputTokens:  inputTokens,
760				OutputTokens: outputTokens,
761				CostUSD:      costUSD,
762			}
763			if writeErr := writeArtifactJSON(artifacts.UsageAbs, usage); writeErr == nil {
764				usageFileRel = artifacts.UsageRel
765			}
766		}
767	
768		// Synthesize a commit when the agent left tracked edits without committing.
769		// Only do so for real changes — harness noise paths are excluded. If nothing
770		// real was staged (committed is false), leave resultRev == baseRev so the
771		// outcome is classified as task_no_changes.
772		if resultRev == baseRev {
773			if isDirty, _ := gitOps.IsDirty(wtPath); isDirty {
774				// Build a preliminary result and write it to result.json before
775				// calling SynthesizeCommit. The commit message is then sourced from
776				// the tracked artifact file, satisfying the provenance contract:
777				// "commit-message metadata must be projected from tracked artifact
778				// files, never from ad hoc runtime state" (FEAT-006).
779				// The final result.json is re-written after the commit with the
780				// correct ResultRev, Outcome, and Status.
781				prelimOutcome := ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskSucceeded
782				if exitCode != 0 {
783					prelimOutcome = ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskFailed
784				}
785				prelimRes := &ExecuteBeadResult{
786					BeadID:       beadID,
787					AttemptID:    attemptID,
788					WorkerID:     opts.WorkerID,
789					BaseRev:      baseRev,
790					ResultRev:    "", // unknown until commit is made
791					Harness:      resultHarness,
792					Provider:     resultProvider,
793					Model:        resultModel,
794					SessionID:    sessionID,
795					DurationMS:   int(finishedAt.Sub(startedAt).Milliseconds()),
796					Tokens:       tokens,
797					CostUSD:      costUSD,
798					ExitCode:     exitCode,
799					Error:        agentErrMsg,
800					ExecutionDir: artifacts.DirRel,
801					PromptFile:   artifacts.PromptRel,
802					ManifestFile: artifacts.ManifestRel,
803					ResultFile:   artifacts.ResultRel,
804					UsageFile:    usageFileRel,
805					StartedAt:    startedAt,
806					FinishedAt:   finishedAt,
807					Outcome:      prelimOutcome,
808				}
809				populateWorkerStatus(prelimRes)
810				_ = writeArtifactJSON(artifacts.ResultAbs, prelimRes)
811	
812				// Render the commit message from the tracked artifact file.
813				commitMsg, msgErr := BuildCommitMessageFromResultFile(artifacts.ResultAbs)
814				if msgErr != nil {
815					commitMsg = "chore: execute-bead iteration " + beadID
816				}
817	
818				if committed, synthErr := gitOps.SynthesizeCommit(wtPath, commitMsg); synthErr == nil && committed {
819					if newRev, _ := gitOps.HeadRev(wtPath); newRev != baseRev {
820						resultRev = newRev
821					}
822				}
823			}
824		}
825	
826		res := &ExecuteBeadResult{
827			BeadID:       beadID,
828			AttemptID:    attemptID,
829			WorkerID:     opts.WorkerID,
830			BaseRev:      baseRev,
831			ResultRev:    resultRev,
832			Harness:      resultHarness,
833			Provider:     resultProvider,
834			Model:        resultModel,
835			SessionID:    sessionID,
836			DurationMS:   int(finishedAt.Sub(startedAt).Milliseconds()),
837			Tokens:       tokens,
838			CostUSD:      costUSD,
839			ExitCode:     exitCode,
840			Error:        agentErrMsg,
841			ExecutionDir: artifacts.DirRel,
842			PromptFile:   artifacts.PromptRel,
843			ManifestFile: artifacts.ManifestRel,
844			ResultFile:   artifacts.ResultRel,
845			UsageFile:    usageFileRel,
846			StartedAt:    startedAt,
847			FinishedAt:   finishedAt,
848		}
849	
850		// Classify worker outcome: task_succeeded / task_failed / task_no_changes.
851		// The parent orchestrator (LandBeadResult + ApplyLandingToResult) will
852		// overwrite Outcome and Status with the landing decision before output.
853		switch {
854		case exitCode != 0:
855			res.Outcome = ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskFailed
856		case resultRev == baseRev:
857			res.Outcome = ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskNoChanges
858		default:
859			res.Outcome = ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskSucceeded
860		}
861	
862		// Classify failure mode from worker-level signals. ApplyLandingToResult
863		// may refine this with landing-level signals (merge conflict, gate
864		// failure) before the final result is output.
865		res.FailureMode = ClassifyFailureMode(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Error)
866	
867		// When the outcome is no_changes, attempt to read the agent's rationale file.
868		// The agent is instructed to write this file (relative to the worktree) when it
869		// determines the bead's work is already present. We read it before the deferred
870		// worktree cleanup removes the file.
871		if res.Outcome == ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskNoChanges {
872			rationaleFile := filepath.Join(wtPath, artifacts.DirRel, "no_changes_rationale.txt")
873			if data, readErr := os.ReadFile(rationaleFile); readErr == nil {
874				res.NoChangesRationale = strings.TrimSpace(string(data))
875			}
876		}
877	
878		// Record routing evidence on the bead (best-effort; errors are discarded).
879		appendBeadRoutingEvidence(opts.BeadEvents, beadID, resultHarness, resultProvider, resultModel, routeReason, routeBaseURL)
880	
881		// Record per-attempt cost evidence so cost rollup never has to join
882		// against the session index. Best-effort; errors are discarded.
883		appendBeadCostEvidence(opts.BeadEvents, beadID, attemptID, costEventBody{
884			Harness:      resultHarness,
885			Provider:     resultProvider,
886			Model:        resultModel,
887			InputTokens:  inputTokens,
888			OutputTokens: outputTokens,
889			TotalTokens:  tokens,
890			CostUSD:      costUSD,
891			DurationMS:   res.DurationMS,
892			ExitCode:     exitCode,
893		})
894	
895		populateWorkerStatus(res)
896		if err := writeArtifactJSON(artifacts.ResultAbs, res); err != nil {
897			return nil, fmt.Errorf("writing execute-bead result artifact: %w", err)
898		}
899	
900		// Optional out-of-band mirror of the bundle. Wired here so the whole
901		// per-attempt directory (manifest, prompt, result, usage, checks,
902		// embedded/) is on disk before the upload starts. Failures never affect
903		// the bead outcome — see executions_mirror.go.
904		MirrorOrLog(MirrorRequest{
905			ProjectRoot: projectRoot,
906			AttemptID:   attemptID,
907			BeadID:      beadID,
908			BundleDir:   artifacts.DirAbs,
909			Cfg:         opts.MirrorCfg,
910		})

data.text:
Committed successfully. All pre-commit hooks passed including the full agent test suite.

Summary: Added `.ddx/run-state.json` live observability file for execute-bead.

- **`cli/internal/agent/run_state.go`** — `RunState` type + atomic `WriteRunState` (tmp+rename), `ReadRunState`, `ClearRunState`.
- **`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go`** — writes run-state after worktree setup with bead_id, attempt_id, harness, model, started_at, worktree_path; deferred `ClearRunState` removes it on any return path.
- **`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_orchestrator.go`** — `RecoverOrphans` sweeps stale run-state (either when it just reaped an orphan for that bead, or when the recorded worktree no longer exists).
- **`cli/internal/agent/run_state_test.go`** — unit test for write/read/cleanup + overwrite + two orphan-recovery cases (stale cleaned, live preserved).
